title: Wire dispatch command to Agent Registry + Meetings
description: Connect the dispatch command to the new Agent Registry and Meeting system. Currently dispatch uses old permission-based roles (spec-author/quality-runner/etc.) and ignores graph.agents, graph.agent_bindings, and graph.meetings. After this change: (1) dispatch queries agent_bindings to find the agent for each action, (2) loads the agent prompt_ref as the sub-agent system prompt, (3) when an action triggers a meeting, outputs meeting orchestration instructions (participants, rounds, expert invite protocol), (4) preserves old permission roles as fallback when no agent binding exists.

audit_log.message: wiring dispatch to agent registry and meetings
dispatch now queries agent_bindings, loads agent prompts, outputs meeting orchestration. 6 new dispatch tests. 357/357 tests pass
